# automq_connector_plugin

![Preview](https://img.shields.io/badge/Lifecycle_Stage-Preview-blue?style=flat&logoColor=8A3BE2&labelColor=rgba)

`automq_connector_plugin` registers a custom Kafka Connect plugin. Plugins are immutable after creation — to change a plugin, delete and recreate it.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "automq_connector_plugin" "s3_sink" {
  environment_id  = "env-xxxxx"
  name            = "s3-sink-connector"
  version         = "10.5.17"
  storage_url     = "s3://my-bucket/plugins/confluentinc-kafka-connect-s3-10.5.17.zip"
  types           = ["SINK"]
  connector_class = "io.confluent.connect.s3.S3SinkConnector"
  description     = "Confluent S3 Sink Connector"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `connector_class` (String) Fully-qualified Java class name of the connector, e.g. `io.confluent.connect.s3.S3SinkConnector`.
- `environment_id` (String) Target AutoMQ environment identifier.
- `name` (String) Display name for the plugin.
- `storage_url` (String) URL where the plugin archive is stored. Supports `s3://`, `http://`, or `https://` schemes.
- `types` (List of String) Plugin types: `SOURCE`, `SINK`, or both.
- `version` (String) Plugin version string (e.g. `1.0.0`).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Free-form text description of the plugin.
- `documentation_link` (String) URL to the plugin documentation.
- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the plugin was created (RFC 3339).
- `id` (String) Plugin identifier assigned by the backend (e.g. `conn-plugin-xxxxx`).
- `plugin_provider` (String) Plugin provider: `AUTOMQ` (system built-in) or `CUSTOM` (user uploaded).
- `status` (String) Current plugin status: `ACTIVE`, `DISABLED`, `PENDING`, `DELETING`, or `DELETED`.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp of the last update to the plugin (RFC 3339).

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).
- `delete` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours). Setting a timeout for a Delete operation is only applicable if changes are saved into state before the destroy operation occurs.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import automq_connector_plugin.s3_sink env-xxxxx@conn-plugin-xxxxx
```

After the import completes, run `terraform plan` to review any drift in optional arguments.
